macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: Indian Sensex and Nifty Surge Over 1.8% in Strong Rebound
items.summary: BSE Sensex rose 1,372 points or 1.89% to 74,068, while NSE Nifty gained 399 points or 1.78% to 22,912 amid broad buying. Indices expected to trade volatile with positive bias on March 25, targeting higher levels like 23,057 for Nifty.

items.title: US Stocks Decline as Middle East Tensions Escalate Oil Prices
items.summary: S&P 500 and Nasdaq each fell 0.5%, Dow dropped 340 points or 0.7% on March 24 amid US-Israel-Iran strikes. Stock futures steady while WTI crude surged 2.6% to $90.41 a barrel.

items.title: JPMorgan Flags US Grid Infrastructure as National Security Risk
items.summary: JPMorgan warns ageing grid networks pose risks from weather and cyberattacks, urging investments in resilient infrastructure amid growing threats.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: CLARITY Act Stablecoin Yield Compromise Text Released for Industry Review
items.summary: Senators Thom Tillis and Angela Alsobrooks released draft language for a stablecoin yield compromise that unblocks the CLARITY Act. Crypto industry leaders reviewed the text in closed-door Capitol Hill meetings, with a Senate Banking Committee markup now targeted for the second half of April.

items.title: Public Launches Crypto Trading in IRAs
items.summary: Public announced that crypto trading is now available in Traditional and Roth IRAs, allowing members to trade Bitcoin, Ethereum, Solana, and other cryptocurrencies with potential tax-deferred or tax-free earnings.

items.title: Bitcoin Rallies Past $71,000 Amid Geopolitical Developments
items.summary: Bitcoin surged past $71,000 on March 23 following Trump's announcement of a five-day pause on Iran strikes, with the broader crypto market recovering from earlier bearish pressure. Solana climbed nearly 10% in seven days to test $94, while XRP posted its strongest weekly gain since January.

items.title: CFTC Issues Guidance on Digital Assets as Derivatives Collateral
items.summary: The CFTC released frequently asked questions on how futures commission merchants and derivatives clearing organizations should handle digital assets as collateral, following its September 2025 proposal to allow tokenized collateral including BTC, ETH, and USDC.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: AI Revolution Accelerates with Multi-Industry Adoption Driving Explosive Growth
items.summary: The AI market in the U.S. is valued at over $40 billion and projected to grow rapidly, with global segments expanding over 30% annually. DigitalOcean announced Workato's use of its AI platform for Llama-3.3-70B, achieving 67% lower inference costs and higher throughput; CoreWeave expanded with NVIDIA HGX B300 for AI workloads.

items.title: Wi-Fi's AI Era Begins with IEEE Approval of AI Offload Study Group
items.summary: IEEE 802.11 approved an AI Offload Study Group to standardize Wi-Fi access points as edge AI compute nodes for offloading inference tasks from devices, reducing cloud latency. Qualcomm led the effort, with next steps at the May 2026 IEEE meeting.

items.title: AI Weekly Highlights Midjourney V8 Alpha, Microsoft MAI-Image-2, and Google AI Tools
items.summary: AI-Weekly's March 24 issue covers key updates including Midjourney's V8 Alpha release, advancements in Microsoft's MAI-Image-2, and Google's new AI design tools.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Pokémon Champions Releases on Nintendo Switch and Switch 2 on April 8, 2026
items.summary: The Pokémon Company announced that Pokémon Champions will release on Nintendo Switch and Nintendo Switch 2 on April 8, 2026. This marks a significant upcoming game launch in the Pokémon series.

items.title: Pokémon VGC Experts Preview London Event
items.summary: Pokémon VGC experts discussed expected top decks and the thrilling Limited Meta format for the upcoming London competition. Coverage is available on official Pokémon Twitch and YouTube channels.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
